programme.title: Zoom in
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom in takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: China 24

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: 24 Mattino
programme.desc: Una prima lettura e analisi dei fatti e dei temi di giornata. Gli elementi di discussione e di dibattito, quello che è importante sapere e quello su cui vale la pena riflettere prima di essere travolti dalla giornata: l'economia, la politica, la cronaca

programme.title: GR - con Redazione Radio 24

programme.title: 24 Mattino - Rassegna stampa
programme.desc: La lettura critica dei giornali, con le aperture, le analisi, i commenti e le idee. L'obiettivo è connettere i punti, cercare di dare un filo conduttore alle notizie internazionali, di politica italiana, di economia, di cronaca.

programme.title: GR - con Redazione Radio 24

programme.title: Due di Denari

programme.title: Effetto giorno
programme.desc: Tutto quello che è accaduto in Italia e nel mondo ed è utile sapere. Effetto giorno è la trasmissione quotidiana che getta lo sguardo oltre le notizie, con analisi e commenti per capire ed approfondire l'attualità attraverso ospiti in diretta,

programme.title: Land of Lakes
programme.desc: In the grasses of Sri Lanka’s scrub forests, a leopard stalks his prey.

programme.title: Forest of Clouds
programme.desc: The forests of Sri Lanka rise above the rest of the country like islands out of the sea.

programme.title: Coast of Giants
programme.desc: As the sun rises over the waters off the southern coast of Sri Lanka, the largest mammal breaks the surface.

programme.title: Cute Little Killers - The Predators With Pouches
programme.desc: Meet maniacs, killers, and sweet-faced assassins in this fun intro to the world’s rarest marsupials.

programme.title: Mad Match - Nature's Strangest Relationships
programme.desc: Our planet is full of strange, wild relationships, from exploitation to symbiosis.

programme.title: Rare Survivors - China's Iconic Wildlife
programme.desc: China's iconic wildlife, from snow leopards to elephants, is much more than just pandas.

programme.title: The Power of the Velvet Paw
programme.desc: Big cats amaze: from tigers to elusive snow leopards, each boasts unique power, elegance, and skill.

programme.title: Freaky Feathers
programme.desc: Worldwide bird journey: Arctic Eiders, Hawaiian albatross couples, Sri Lankan magpies, and Aussie cockatoos.

programme.title: Planet of the Primates
programme.desc: Explore our closest relatives: snub-nosed monkeys at 4,000m, macaques in hot springs, and Thai macaque feasts.

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: This is the story of how hummingbirds became the ultimate creatures of the air.

programme.title: Dragons & Damsels
programme.desc: More beautiful than butterflies and better fliers than hummingbirds, dragonflies are ultimate insects.

programme.title: The Real Dingo
programme.desc: Not even the big bad wolf can touch the dingo when it comes to being feared and hated.

programme.title: Spring
programme.desc: It’s a giant leap back to life and spring time’s just the right time to welcome a new generation.

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: The world may change, but nature has devised ingenious ways to survive and thrive whatever the season.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Light On Earth
programme.desc: Bioluminescence is everywhere—land, sea, and soil. Attenborough reveals its wonders!

programme.title: From Cubs To Kings
programme.desc: Thousands of miles from their home, a pair of tiny, new-born lion cubs are posing for tourist snapshots.

programme.title: Reasons to Love
programme.desc: Too many legs? Feathers? Tentacles as arms? Behold, there’s more to nature’s greatest than fluffy cuteness!

programme.title: Voices of Nature
programme.desc: Witness the connections developed of years that Korea’s human population have made with its wildlife.

programme.title: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: The notorious demilitarized zone of Korea has existed on the boundary of two warring nations for nearly 70 years where a tense standoff still remains. However, amidst the barbed wire fences and thousands of land mines, a unique natural wonderland from wild boar to giant hornets to rare cranes peacefully co-exist alongside the ashes of war.

programme.title: Guadalquivir: Great River, The
programme.desc: A fox leads us on a journey along the Guadalquivir, Europe's wildlife paradise, to the Atlantic.

programme.title: River In The Sky
programme.desc: Brazil has a river that is bigger than the Amazon. Yet until recently it was unknown and remains invisible.

programme.title: Giraffe: Up High And Personal
programme.desc: Giraffes, nearly six meters tall, are wonders of physiology, yet long overlooked by scientists.

programme.title: Snow Leopard & Friends
programme.desc: A moving true story about the power of nature, of motherhood, and the fragility of life.

programme.title: Fragile Forest
programme.desc: An enigmatic forest, home to South America's largest monkey and birds learning dances over 10 years.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Brazil's secret lies in its vast grasslands, shaped by summer storms and fire, and its least known habitat.

programme.title: Labyrinth of Lakes
programme.desc: Otters thrive in the dry season but must let the caiman take over when it becomes a vast glittering swamp.

programme.title: Paradise Coast
programme.desc: Brazil’s coast offers more than Copacabana: whales, dolphins, octopuses, and deadly snakes make it diverse.

programme.title: Flooded Forest
programme.desc: One in ten species live in the Amazon, where its size, diversity, and annual flooding create relationships.

programme.title: Follow Your Cat
programme.desc: With a scientist that specializes in cats and modern technology we follow the cat on their wild wanderings.

programme.title: You, Planet
programme.desc: An unknown yet familiar planet, this alien world is not from space – it’s you.

programme.title: Wondrous & Wild
programme.desc: A glimpse at the marvelous life on Earth, from births to deaths, joy to danger, day to night.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 1
programme.desc: In summer, the Glade is a paradise in Ruaha's dry plains, always providing water and sparking relationships.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 2
programme.desc: As the dry continues in Ruaha, herds of elephants arrive in the Glade.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 3
programme.desc: Cubs grow quickly, learning to hunt, until one young lion begins to change, disrupting life in the Glade.

programme.title: Wonders Of Africa: What A Difference A Day Makes
programme.desc: In Africa, where giants roam and predators hunt, every day brings wonders, life, and death.

programme.title: Wild Ways of the Coast
programme.desc: Many dream of sandy beaches, palm-lined inlets, and marine life thriving across coasts and mangroves.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: At first sight, our atmosphere seems empty. But this mantle of air is a habitat for life in its own right.

programme.title: Land
programme.desc: Viewed from space, our blue planet seems so familiar that we forget how extraordinary it is.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: The oceans act as a driving force for local weather phenomena and global climate change.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Apes, Dogs
programme.desc: Four small leopards are born, while the wild dog pack has managed to dig their way to the monkeys.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard, Wild Dog
programme.desc: Schalk brings a litter of wild dogs to Harnas, and for caracal Tammy a new chapter is about to start.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Lizard, Leopard
programme.desc: A monitor lizard has made himself comfortable between 19 wild cheetahs.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard
programme.desc: One of seven cheetahs living in the enclosure near the built-up area of the farm is about to be released.

programme.title: Practice makes perfect
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson moves 27 lions and 14 hyenas, facing challenges with reluctant animals and permits.

programme.title: Precious Cargo
programme.desc: Kevin fights to relocate lions and hyenas, forming a new pride while managing hyena tensions.

programme.title: Leap Of The Lynx
programme.desc: Until five years ago, both populations of Iberian lynx were quickly fading away.

programme.title: King of the Seas - Sea Eagle
programme.desc: Germany’s Sea eagles thrive by stealing food from sea ravens, showcasing their expert poaching skills.

programme.title: King of the Mountains - Golden Eagle
programme.desc: Witness Golden eagles in aerial views, showcasing their majestic flights, and hunting skills.

programme.title: The Art of Seduction
programme.desc: Life is filled with magical moments. Some are extra-special.

programme.title: Masters of Disguise
programme.desc: Size is no obstacle for these wild magicians, from tiny insects to the mega-mammals of the African plains.

programme.title: Smart and Smarter
programme.desc: Navigation without a map? No problem. Building a fortress out of living bodies? Check.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E11 - 18 Minutes
programme.desc: In this episode, the Wardens look into a case of elk harassment and a possible poaching incident in Montana.

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E12 - Thin Ice
programme.desc: Nick Taylor responds to a call about duck hunters shooting duck over thin ice. Then, Bryan Golie keeps an eye on the Bear Tooth Game Range on opening morning of elk season.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E03 - Russian Army in Chechnya
programme.desc: After the fall of the soviet union many countries remained in dispute in the early nineties despite eastern Europe‘s independence. In 1994 a bitter conflict broke out between the forces of the Chechen independence movement and the Russian regular army. Despite overwhelming manpower, weaponry and air support, the Russian forces were unable to establish effective permanent control over the mountainous area due to many successful Chechen guerrilla raids. Improvised Explosive Devices were one of the most effective methods employed in these disastrous raids and were the back drop to many Close Quarter Battle scenarios exchanged between the two sides.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E04 - SAS in Northern Ireland
programme.desc: The history of the British Empire colonial legacy in Northern Ireland is well known the world over but a there is a largely untold story of the the firefights between and close quarter battles exchanged between the provisional IRA, the British army and the elite SAS. Although the IRA often employed „terrorist“ techniques within the city of London and on England‘s mainland not much is said of the often guerilla warfare techniques of the British Special Air Service in Northern Ireland since the beginning of this conflict. In this episode we will examine how the history of the Special Air Service affected the training of every elite force after it and how the close quarter battles in...

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E09 - Operation Bruin and Peanut Road
programme.desc: Game Wardens dive into a challenging case with 'Operation Bruin'. Later, they share a funny tale about a decoy deer mishap in 'Peanut Road'. Wardens also reminisce about memorable investigations from their experiences.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E10 - Strange Killings and Dog Help
programme.desc: In "Strange Killings," you'll hear about an incredible tale of chaos out in the wilderness. Then, in "Dog Help," a trusty dog lends a hand to a Game Warden. Game Wardens share some of the most memorable cases and stories from their careers.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E01 - Into the Unknown
programme.desc: In the season premiere, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer are dropped in the wilderness of New Zealand with virtually nothing. They must quickly adapt to their new environment or face life threatening consequences.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E02 - White Water
programme.desc: The adrenaline has worn off for Chris and Casey, and the jet lag has set in. The brothers face frigid temperatures and unpredictable whitewater rapids. When they try to navigate the rough waterways, their safety is threatened.

programme.desc: The adrenaline has worn off for Chris and Casey, and the jet lag has set in. The brothers face frigid temperatures and unpredictable whitewater rapids. When they try to navigate the rough waterways, their safety is threatened.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E26 - Prince William A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: Explore the exciting and intriguing life of the future king, Prince William, in this engaging documentary.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E03 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers make an important decision that vastly impacts their expedition. In a desperate search of necessary food, they attempt to hunt big game for the first time in New Zealand, and encounter a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E04 - Driving the Bus
programme.desc: Chris and Casey are introduced to the tastes of the New Zealand wild, and get a rude awakening. Mother Nature's mind games start to mess with the brothers' mental strength, while their inflatable raft continues to be a serious problem.

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E13 - 700 Yards
programme.desc: Joe Kambic patrols Deer Lodge, Montana and Kqyn Kuka attempts to rescue a sick buck from the ice.

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E14 - Sullivan Hill
programme.desc: It's elk hunting season in Montana, and Bryan Golie is keeping an eye out for any hunters acting suspiciously. Meanwhile, Paul Luepke is dealing with two hunters who shot mule deer does without having the right permits.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E05 - Delta Prison Rescue Operation
programme.desc: In 1989, CIA operative Kurt Muse was imprisoned at the notorious Carcel Modelo in Panama for his role in organizing radio transmissions against dictator Manuel Noriega. That December, an elite group of the US Delta Force breached the roof of the prison, and one of the most daring close quarter battle operations in history began. From the dramatic helicopter crash and wounding of several Delta operators to the extraction of the entire team by the 5th Infantry Division, this is prime material for CQB analysis. In this episode, CQB recreates the raid, focusing on the “sub-second” reflexes of the Delta Force team from the moment they entered the prison to their extraction from the roof of the...

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E06 - Snipers and Scout
programme.desc: Joint Task Force Two (JTF 2) is the elite Canadian Forces Special Operations unit responsible for a broad range of missions, including counter-terrorism and armed assistance to other government departments. Highly secretive, JTF 2 and its predecessor, the Canadian Airborne Regiment, have been deployed in hotspots around the world from Haiti to Bosnia. This episode focuses on the legendary JTF sniper teams and their use in Afghanistan alongside the British SAS and the US Delta Force at “the sharp end of the spear.” A book written by an ex-JTF member explains how, in 2006, both the Pentagon and the British Foreign Office noted the instrumental role that JTF 2 played in the rescue of the...

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E01 - American Icons
programme.desc: American buffalo are being caught and researched with the assistance of American motocross champ Ryan Villopoto.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E02 - Big Move
programme.desc: Ivan is off to Zimbabwe to team up with conservationists focusing on capturing and relocating 100 elephants.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E01 - Rhino Wars
programme.desc: Carter's W.A.R. (Wild Animal Response) is the untold story of one man's quest to save his homeland, the world's most wild and dangerous continent on earth, Africa. From heavily armed poachers butchering elephants for their tusks to the slaughter of rhinos for their horns, Africa's most precious resource is in peril. Can one man expose the truth and make a difference? Watch as wildlife detective and professional hunter, Ivan Carter, takes you inside the real Africa to the front lines of the wars being waged on its wildlife. In this episode Ivan Carter exposes the secret war in Africa. A war of greed that's putting the rhino in danger.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E09 - Disguised
programme.desc: Now you see me… now you don’t. A look at the masters of disguise. From hidden lizards and invisible spiders to camouflaged cats and shimmering squids.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E10 - Micro Predators
programme.desc: They may be small but don’t be fooled - micro predators can be deadly. From the impressive serial killer Portia spider to the hundreds of species of ants and the archerfish with its precision firing of water droplets to secure its prey Wild Ones peers through the microscope to uncover their true lethality.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E11 - Most Poisonous_
programme.desc: You wouldn’t want to be bitten by any of these but which one has the deadliest poison? The venom from the most poisonous snake on the planet? A rare poisonous lizard? Or is it the blue ringed octopus?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E12 - Migration
programme.desc: Animals, big and not so big, traverse hundreds of miles – some in search of food, others to find ideal breeding grounds. From Zebras crossing the savannahs of Africa to the huge journeys undertaken by turtles to find the perfect beach to lay their eggs – the annual and often dangerous journeys are simply mind boggling.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S03:E04 - Montana Whitetail
programme.desc: Laramy is on the trail for whitetail in Montana. It's a crisp, cold morning and he soon spies his quarry.

programme.title: Sinister Storms
programme.desc: Electric skies, animal rescues, destructive twisters, and a shadowed eclipse signal something sinister.

programme.title: Sinister Storms
programme.desc: Ride into the intense beauty and test the resilience of the natural world.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Following an intense hurricane season, Hurricane Michael is poised to hit Florida.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Jaclyn Whittal and Mark Robinson are in Tornado Alley to track down some of the most ferocious weather.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Another chase through the hotbed of wicked weather puts the storm hunters a little too close to the danger zone. Will Mark & Jaclyn see the tornado they’re hoping for before it’s too late?

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: After a successful hunt., Adrian Knopps' hunting partner disappears taking their bear out to the boat. Now Adrian finds himself stranded on a tidal flat surround by bears and wolf packs and with massive storm bearing down on him. How will he survive?

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Justin and Jeremy Harris' weekend descent into a remote Utah canyon becomes a survival nightmare when Justin severely breaks his leg. As night fast approaches and temperatures drop below freezing, how will these two brothers survive?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks e il suo nascituro furono brutalmente uccisi. Il corpo venne scoperto dal fidanzato Keyon Pittman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1993, la giovane madre Tammy Tatum fu trovata violentata e uccisa nel suo appartamento di Longmont, in Colorado. La polizia inizialmente sospettò del suo ex marito, ma non aveva prove sufficienti per accusarlo e il caso è rimasto irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, la casa mobile di Effie e Michael Ratley prese fuoco e Michael salvò la moglie e il figlio neonato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2004, la studentessa di infermieristica Tamika Huston sparì dalla sua casa a Spartanburg, Sud Carolina. Una soffiata portò gli investigatori alla sua macchina e trovarono chiavi di casa ignote che avrebbero potuto aiutare a risolvere il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fu uno dei casi più insoliti nella storia forense. Gli investigatori dovevano trovare un modo per risolvere un caso di omicidio con prove composte da un pomodoro schiacciato trovato sul luogo del delitto e piccoli riflessi di luce in una foto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna venne violentata, pugnalata più volte e lasciata morire. Quando qualcuno che coincideva con la descrizione si è praticamente costituito, la polizia era sicura di avere il suo uomo... finché le prove del DNA non hanno dimostrato il contrario.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, Shamaia Smith scomparve dallo strip club in cui lavorava a East Hartford, CT. La polizia indagò su vari clienti dello strip club, ma si concentrò sull'uomo d'affari locale Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un'insegnante devota e rispettata scomparve, la polizia dovette determinare se fosse andata in vacanza senza dirlo a nessuno o se fosse stata vittima di un crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo aver sparato alla testa delle vittime, l'assassino ha inscenato la scena del crimine, ha messo le prove incriminanti in un sacchetto di plastica e le ha gettate nel fiume.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Anche se la loro figlia era già scappata, tornava sempre. I suoi genitori erano sicuri che questa volta non sarebbe stato diverso, ma si sbagliavano.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane madre del Colorado scompare improvvisamente il giorno del Ringraziamento. Quando la polizia ritrova il suo cellulare, scopre un personaggio sorprendente con una storia ancora più sorprendente.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un incendio in casa uccide l'unico medico in città. Un'indagine sugli incendi dolosi suggerisce che sia stato il figlio dell'infermiera del medico.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Gli investigatori pensano di sapere chi ha ucciso una donna, ma la nuova tecnologia forense capovolge il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un negozio di abbigliamento di lusso a Bethesda, Maryland, rivela una scena raccapricciante: una dipendente, 30 anni, viene trovata morta mentre il suo collega, 28 anni, è malconcio e legato. Le telecamere di sorveglianza fanno luce sul movente.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un uomo anziano viene colpito e ucciso mentre era in viaggio. Gli omicidi casuali sono tra i più difficili da risolvere, ma la balistica offre un vantaggio agli investigatori.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un serial killer è in fuga da vent'anni. Quando viene arrestato, la polizia fa una scoperta inaspettata.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: I medici non riescono a capire perché una donna della California continua a ammalarsi. Quando muore, gli investigatori scoprono che qualcuno aveva mentito.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Dopo che due operai sono stati uccisi in un cantiere, la polizia si concentra su un indizio importante.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: In una storia di rapimenti, riscatti e omicidi a Los Angeles, due scienziati in pensione usano l'attrezzatura sonar per localizzare le vittime sul fondo di un bacino idrico.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Tiffany Rowell e tre dei suoi amici furono brutalmente assassinati nel loro ricco quartiere di Clear Lake, in Texas, e la scena del crimine fornì poche prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1995, la cameriera di Palm Beach Denise O'Neill venne rapita e uccisa. Il suo vicino Luis Caballero destò sospetti per il suo strano comportamento nei confronti delle troupe televisive che riprendevano il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Indagando su un brutale omicidio, la scientifica aveva chiara una cosa: l'assassino conosceva la vittima.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In poco più di un mese due donne che vivevano nello stesso complesso residenziale furono brutalmente uccise. Le analogie delle scene del crimine portarono la polizia a pensare si trattasse di un serial killer che covava un forte odio verso le donne.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La videosorveglianza in un casinò seguì i movimenti di una giovane fino a poco prima della sua scomparsa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima è stata pugnalata più di trenta volte e la scena del crimine è piena del suo sangue. Vicino alla sua testa, la polizia scopre un caratteristico bottone con pezzi di filo ancora attaccati.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una bambina di sei anni è scappata e si è nascosta quando ha visto sua nonna picchiata a morte, ma l'uomo l'ha seguita, picchiata e aggredita. Ha detto che l'aggressore era suo zio, che è stato condannato. Anni dopo ha ritrattato la testimonianza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima era un self-made man che non ha mai usato mezzi termini. Forse è stato assassinato da un cliente o da un dipendente insoddisfatto. Forse le foto audaci nella sua cassaforte contenevano l'indizio per risolvere il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, la casa mobile di Effie e Michael Ratley prese fuoco e Michael salvò la moglie e il figlio neonato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La scena del delitto era piuttosto violenta: marito e moglie erano stati colpiti a morte in camera da letto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, Ken, il marito di Kristine Fitzhugh, la trovò morta in fondo alle scale della loro casa a Palo Alto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando due donne scomparvero e in seguito furono ritrovate brutalmente assassinate, la polizia si chiese se fossero vittime di un crimine d'odio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna venne violentata, pugnalata più volte e lasciata morire. Quando qualcuno che coincideva con la descrizione si è praticamente costituito, la polizia era sicura di avere il suo uomo... finché le prove del DNA non hanno dimostrato il contrario.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2005, il corpo della giovane madre Summer Baldwin fu trovato in una valigia in una discarica del Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando il cancelliere Peter Porco non si presenta al lavoro nel novembre 2004, un funzionario del tribunale è richiesto a casa della famiglia Porco a Bethlehem, New York.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, l'immobiliarista texana Sarah Anne Walker fu trovata brutalmente uccisa in una casa modello. Settimane dopo si presentò un testimone che forse vide il killer. La polizia usò l'ipnosi forense per fargli evocare i dettagli fisici dell'uomo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35 anni, venne condannata per l'omicidio di David Nixon nell'aprile 2002 dopo che aveva pianificato di porre fine alla loro relazione.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una guardia di sicurezza è scomparsa dalla sua postazione senza lasciare traccia. I suoi resti furono ritrovati un anno dopo in un campeggio sperduto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1969, l'operatrice telefonica venticinquenne Diane Maxwell venne stuprata e uccisa. Suo fratello promise che avrebbe scoperto il responsabile e assicurato l'assassino alla giustizia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alla vigilia di Natale del 2005, il corpo di un uomo nero viene trovato bruciato vicino a Baltimora. È poi identificato come Wesley Person, 26enne. I tipici materiali edili anni '30 trovati vicino al corpo sono un ruolo chiave per risolvere il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo che il sospetto fu accusato di incendio doloso e delitto, sostenne la sua innocenza ma fu condannato a 25 anni di galera. Ricorse a testi legali nella biblioteca del carcere e a programmi di scienza forense e decise di provare la sua innocenza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La scena del delitto era piuttosto violenta: marito e moglie erano stati colpiti a morte in camera da letto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, la casa mobile di Effie e Michael Ratley prese fuoco e Michael salvò la moglie e il figlio neonato.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In poco più di un mese due donne che vivevano nello stesso complesso residenziale furono brutalmente uccise. Le analogie delle scene del crimine portarono la polizia a pensare si trattasse di un serial killer che covava un forte odio verso le donne.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fu trovata morta nel suo appartamento a Bryan, in Texas, e le emorragie petecchiali nei suoi occhi indicavano che era stata strangolata.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una studentessa dell'ultimo anno è stata trovata violentata e uccisa vicino a un sentiero sterrato usato dagli studenti per camminare da un lato all'altro del campus.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un vicedirettore di una steakhouse della Florida viene pugnalato a morte. Sembra essere una rapina andata male, ma un'impronta insanguinata rivela che conosceva il suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fu uno dei casi più insoliti nella storia forense. Gli investigatori dovevano trovare un modo per risolvere un caso di omicidio con prove composte da un pomodoro schiacciato trovato sul luogo del delitto e piccoli riflessi di luce in una foto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Tiffany Rowell e tre dei suoi amici furono brutalmente assassinati nel loro ricco quartiere di Clear Lake, in Texas, e la scena del crimine fornì poche prove.

programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.desc: Nel 2007, Shamaia Smith scomparve dallo strip club in cui lavorava a East Hartford, CT. La polizia indagò su vari clienti dello strip club, ma si concentrò sull'uomo d'affari locale Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima era benvoluta e di successo, il che rendeva ancora più difficile da capire la crudeltà del crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il rapinatore sparò quando la famiglia di quattro persone entrò in casa, uccidendone due e ferendo gli altri. Aprì alcuni cassetti per far sembrare che si trattasse di una rapina, ma la scena del delitto era stata chiaramente preparata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 20 maggio 2001, Carrie Nelson, allora ventenne, è stata picchiata a morte mentre lavorava da sola in un ufficio del parco.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Uno scheletro umano venne scoperto nelle paludi della Carolina del Nord. Quando gli investigatori seppero che era morta da 18 mesi, capirono che sarebbe stato difficile scoprire chi fosse, tanto meno chi l'avesse uccisa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una ragazza di 13 anni scomparve dalla sua casa in Colorado e l'unica prova che il rapitore aveva lasciato erano tre impronte digitali su una zanzariera.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, il corpo della ballerina esotica Rachel Siani fu trovato sotto un ponte in New Jersey. Gli inquirenti si chiesero se fosse suicidio. Scoprirono che Rachel si offrì di aiutare un cliente ubriaco, John "Jack" Denofa, in una stanza di motel.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1986, Gary Dale Larson fu pugnalato a morte nella sua casa a Edmond, in Oklahoma, e poi l'assassino violentò la fidanzata di Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1989, i cadaveri di Joan Rogers e delle due figlie adolescenti furono trovati a galleggiare a Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Di solito è facile determinare come un criminale è entrato sulla scena del crimine... ma non in questo caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quanto può essere sfortunato un uomo? Sua moglie si è tolta la vita e la sua fidanzata del college si uccise allo stesso modo quattordici anni prima. Gli investigatori dovevano stabilire se si trattasse solo di una strana coincidenza o di un delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2001, Ginger Hayes e suo figlio Nicholas furono rapiti durante un furto d'auto e il crimine fu denunciato da un testimone pochi minuti dopo l'accaduto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19enne, fu condannata per aver pugnalato la madre, Barbara Mullenix, il 13 settembre 2006, e poi aver imballato il suo cadavere insanguinato in una scatola di cartone prima di scaricarlo a Newport Bay, sulla costa della California.

Guglielmo ottiene la prima giacca nera. Durante il servizio, i cuochi sono osservati da Bottura e alla fine, le giacche nere rimanenti vengono consegnate a Carlotta, Shaban, Kristian e Amalia in questo ordine.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: La squadra ha un raro incontro con un misterioso Drago Anziano nella Foresta Ingannevole mentre continuano la ricerca del Cristallo della Fratellanza.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Il Cristallo della Fratellanza finale si trova tra le rovine della montagna gelata. Lute e Manelger sono alla ricerca, ma la nuova gemma meccanica di Cheval cambia tutto.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Cheval mette alla prova la sua nuova forza, ma neanche lui è al sicuro dal Flagello Nero. Lute cerca di rimettere le cose a posto.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute y Cheval affrontan l'incredibile potenza del Flagello Nero, un mostro in grado di spazzare via interi villaggi dalle mappe. Ratha affronta un suo combattimento.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: La battaglia di Lute e Ratha con el formidabile Orrore Nero divampa, ma l'arma segreta di Lute, el potere della Fratellanza, cambierà le sorti della storia.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Gli acchiappamostri
programme.desc: Un’avventura soprannaturale per tutta la famiglia. Alex vuole aiutare il suo fratellino a smettere di avere incubi, quindi decide di formare una squadra per prendersi cura dei suoi mostri immaginari.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Il cane pompiere
programme.desc: Il cagnolino più coccolato di Hollywood si perde durante le riprese di una pubblicità e finisce per diventare la mascotte di una caserma dei pompieri locale.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: Jack Simpatico Genio
programme.desc: Jack, uno scimpanzé scappato da poco da un laboratorio sperimentale, impara a pattinare ad un allenamento di hockey dove, Steven e i suoi compagni di squadra, scoprono che ha un talento naturale; così Jack entra a far parte della squadra.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Nocedicocco: Il piccolo drago
programme.desc: Nocedicocco è un draghetto sputafuoco che non ha ancora imparato a volare e che ha anche qualche problema nello sputare il fuoco. L'unico che ha davvero fiducia in lui è il nonno che lo vede come un se stesso giovane. Gli assegna così un compito di responsabilità...

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider del Villaggio di Hakum si preparano per indagare sul rapimento di Avinia da parte dei misteriosi Rider Oscuri. Che cosa vogliono da lei?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale, dei Rider Oscuri, attacca Lute per prendergli la Gemma della Fratellanza. Visti i poteri del suo Monstie, la squadra parte per incontrare il Wyveriano, ovvero "L'Evocatore".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Un altro membro degli Ebon Rider minaccia il nuovo Rider del Villaggio di Hakum, mentre Lute e i suoi amici incontrano un vecchio amico e scoprono il "Rito dell'Evocazione".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mentre cercano Avinia, Cheval e Cryo si imbattono in un altro Ebon Rider, Shadow, il cui Nargacuga si muove più veloce della luce.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Nariki, stanco da una sessione di allenamento e da una discussione con il suo Monstie, incontra inaspettatamente l'ultimo dei Quattro Sommi Rider Oscuri.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Debli è deciso a fare la sua parte nell'operazione di salvataggio della sua amica Avinia e si prepara per il Rito di Evocazione. Aspetta, ma da quando è un Rider?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute sa esattamente quale mostro vorrebbe usare per il suo primo Rito di Evocazione. Nel frattempo, i Rider Oscuri fanno di tutto per trovarlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È il turno di Cheval di andare a cercare un potente mostro per aumentare le abilità di Rathi, ma non è pronto per la lunga e fredda traversata delle Distese Innevate di Darj.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Info not available
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Info not available
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Info not available
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Info not available
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Sardegna experience
programme.desc: Il viaggio di Luigi Pomata nella sua Sardegna, dall'entroterra al mare un caleidoscopio di sapori e saperi. Luoghi, persone e tradizioni che rendono unica questa isola

programme.title: Sardegna experience
programme.desc: Il viaggio di Luigi Pomata nella sua Sardegna, dall'entroterra al mare un caleidoscopio di sapori e saperi. Luoghi, persone e tradizioni che rendono unica questa isola

programme.title: Questa terra e' la mia terra S14
programme.desc: Caponata - Crostino alla zingara - Crostone. In questa nuova serie Peppe Guida ospita nella sua tenuta di Montechiaro, alcuni importanti produttori di vino. Un modo per far incontrare una cucina semplice ma raffinatissima con alcuni grandi vini

programme.title: La mia Sardegna
programme.desc: Sardi di carattere - L’essenza di questa terra si rivelerà attraverso le persone che Giuseppe incontrerà. Vecchi e nuovi amici che lo guideranno alla scoperta della bottarga, del vino e della birra, in un’emozionante esperienza tutta da vivere

programme.title: L'erba del barone S3
programme.desc: Stevia e Artemisia - Stevia o pianta del miele e artemisia, piante antichissime importantissime per la medicina naturale, sono le protagoniste dell'orto del Barone

programme.title: Beker on tour S31
programme.desc: Cevapcici - Tre tipi di carni, spezie e un ingrediente speciale, il bicarbonato per questa ricette che Fabrizio realizza con il suo amico Nikola, i cevapcici, polpette tipiche della zona balcanica

programme.title: Parola di chef

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Smiling host Vanessa Gianfrancesco loves Bread for Brunch and so will you! In this episode she shares mouthwatering mid-morning bread recipes.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Charming host Vanessa is your host for this Dim Sum episode -- try your hand at dumplings, congee and more!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Fun host Vanessa answers the question "Where should I cook for brunch today?" Join her for Brunch Around The World!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: What do they eat for brunch in the Middle East? Friendly host Vanessa is excited to show you with these tasty recipes!

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: In the stark ruins of a remote forest fire, morel mushrooms sprout in the ashes. Watch their journey across thousands of miles from forest to feast.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: Documentary series that follows the amazing journey of an ingredient from its originating source to its final destination.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: Millions of pounds of cranberries start their global journey from a Nova Scotia farm. Watch one batch make their way from field to Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: From the cool clear blue waters of Vancouver to a beachside grill, watch the harrowing journey of a highly sought-after spot prawn.

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Sweden - Swedish Turnips and Granola, Mexico - Radicchio Tacos, Senegal - Cashew-Sweeth Potato Maafe, and Italy - Bok Choy Fusili!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by South Africa - Braaied Rapini, Iceland - Cold Icelandic Pepper Soup, Bangladesh - Edamame Jhalmuri, and Spain - Spanish Broccoli Tortilla!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by India - Bhindi Masala-Style Nopales, Belgium - Belgian Plantain Waffles, Italy - Almond Crusted Portobellos, and China - Sichuan Artichoke Stir Fry!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by the USA - Scalloped Cassava Casserole, Vietnam - Pear Summer Rolls, Spain - Hempseed Romesco with Leeks, and India - Potato Biryani Hash!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: You won't want to miss the ever personable Vanessa's sumptuous seafood snacks on this episode of Let's Brunch!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Looking for a brunch that gets past the usual old 'eggs and bacon' rut? Check out Vanessa's amazing Vegan Brunch ideas!

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Brazil-born Iafa Almeida Cac that she has roots from other places. Alongside an expert chef, Iafa cooks a recipe that blends fresh ingredients from her Brazilian and newfound culture.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: The Italian region Campania is known for its seafood and pizza. Famed Chef Michael Bonacini prepares classics like Margherita Pizza and Fried Seafood.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Pasta, bread, pizza dough! Host Michael Bonacini makes Apulian classics like Artichoke Cheese Panzerotti.

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.desc: From Fettuccine Alfredo to Meatloaf, everyday recipes are enjoyed every day for a reason: we love them! Chefs Shahir Massoud and Jasmin Ibrahim use spices to punch up these classic recipes. Meatloaf gets aromatic allspice, and is topped with bay leaf spiked ketchup. Fettuccine gets mustard; both the seed and the leafy green! Bacon and fried rice are ultimate comfort foods, but have you ever tried it with cardamom in the mix? Spice is the secret, a pinch of spice can make a world of difference!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.desc: Vanessa and Stefania take a delicious trip down memory lane with a menu of meaningful dishes and a table to match! There’s Tuscan beans, gnocchi with a duo of sauces, short rib braciole, chocolate semifreddo, and so much more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: The greatest staple of Italian cuisine? Olive oil! Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco uses olive oil to make delightful Italian dishes.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Fish loves spice and Chef Spencer Watts loves fish so he brings the delicious world of spice to halibut and lobster along with some cooling sides.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shares some of his favorite mackerel and mussel recipes that highlight aromatic, vibrant and fresh herbs.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Sturgeon and prawns meet wines and liqueurs in Chef Spencer Watts' kitchen as he brings seafood and booze together in delicious culinary concoctions.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts dishes on delicious ways to stuff rainbow trout and oysters and how to use them to stuff in a sandwich or even an avocado parcel.

programme.title: One World Kitchen

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: Med Nations 03 Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey, where cultures, continents, and centuries of history all come together. Turkey has a lot of different traditions, flavours, and history that have been shaped by powerful empires and cultural crossroads that have been around for hundreds of years. You can see this from the busy streets of Istanbul to the sunny Mediterranean coast.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Music Festivals All Over the Med
programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music. From Malta high energy Rock the South and sophisticated Malta Jazz Festival, to Italy cutting edge Limbo Festival, Spain forward thinking Sonar Festival, and Turkey classical and contemporary Istanbul Music Festival, every corner of the region vibrates with rhythm, passion, and creativity.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Step into a world of hearty and inventive flavors with oven-baked meatballs paired with succulent pork tenderloin, followed by a creamy and naturally sweet avocado and date mousse for dessert. A delightful combination of savory comfort and unique, indulgent sweetness.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Blockchain in Real Estate Panel
programme.desc: As blockchain moves from theory to practice, this panel examines its growing role in real estate. Speakers unpack how decentralised systems are changing transactions, ownership records, and trust, while addressing the challenges of regulation, scalability, and industry readiness in today’s market.

programme.title: Med Minds 05 Plato
programme.desc: Plato, the philosopher of Athens, questioned life, truth, and society, leaving ideas that still shape the world.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slovenia, a small nation of just two million people, is one of Europe’s most surprising delights. Nestled at the crossroads of the Germanic, Mediterranean, and Slavic worlds, it offers a charm all its own.

programme.title: Whats On Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean dances to its own beat. Malta Muzika Muzika showcases national talent, while Italy Nameless Festival delivers international rock and electronic energy. Spain Azkena Rock Festival rocks Vitoria Gasteiz with legendary performances, and Turkey Istanbul Caz Festival blends jazz and local musical traditions. Discover how Mediterranean rhythms echo across genres, generations, and cultures.

programme.desc: Malini Angelica heads to Alexandria, Egypt’s Mediterranean city, exploring its blend of Greek, Roman, and Egyptian history. With a lively student scene, fresh seafood, and a relaxed seaside vibe, she discovers why Alexandria is an underrated, modern-feeling escape.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Tuscany
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Tuscany, one of Italy’s most picturesque and beloved regions. Malini enjoys local wine tastings, traditional Tuscan dishes, and breathtaking landscapes, capturing the timeless charm and warmth that make Tuscany truly unforgettable.

programme.title: Mediterraneo
programme.desc: In the heart of the Mediterranean lies a world where nature keeps some of its most breathtaking secrets. Carved between Africa, Asia, and Europe, this deep sea is home to extraordinary wildlife and waters so blue they draw visitors from across the globe. A sea that not only boasts natural beauty but also witnessed the dawn of the world’s earliest civilisations.

programme.title: The Odyssey on Odysseus Trail
programme.desc: Ten years after the sack of Troy, Zeus is alone on Olympus, with only his daughter Athena remaining at his side. She tries to convince her father to help Odysseus, the last Greek fighter who has not yet returned home to Ithaca.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. A landmark cultural event, this open-air performance brings world-class music to the heart of the city. Television direction by Stefania Grimaldi captures the grandeur and emotion of the evening.

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios

programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.desc: As artificial intelligence reshapes the property landscape, standing still is no longer an option. This panel explores how AI is transforming the Mediterranean real estate market—from predictive analytics and smarter valuations to automated design, marketing, and investment strategies that give early adopters a decisive edge. Beyond the tools, the discussion digs into what actually fuels AI: data, energy, infrastructure, and talent—and how these hidden drivers are redefining competition itself. By unpacking both the opportunities and the risks, this conversation reveals how forward-thinking developers, investors, and agencies can stay ahead in a market where technology is now as valuable as location.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Mediterraneo
programme.desc: In the heart of the Mediterranean lies a world where nature keeps some of its most breathtaking secrets. Carved between Africa, Asia, and Europe, this deep sea is home to extraordinary wildlife and waters so blue they draw visitors from across the globe. A sea that not only boasts natural beauty but also witnessed the dawn of the world’s earliest civilisations.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Rome
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Rome, Italy — a city of ancient ruins, grand monuments, and unforgettable food. She experiences daily Roman life, from enjoying cappuccino and cornetto at a local café to tasting classic pastas like cacio e pepe and pasta alla gricia. She visits local markets, enjoys a picnic at Villa Doria Pamphili, and discovers Rome’s iconic landmarks — the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, and Pantheon — beautifully lit at night.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 20
programme.desc: Savor the flavors of Cyprus with Agiotiko stew, a rich and hearty traditional dish, paired with a delicate cream of anari wrapped in crispy filo pastry. A satisfying mix of savory comfort and sweet indulgence.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: MED Destination LJUBLJANA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: The Odyssey the Man Who Defied the Gods
programme.desc: Devastated by the meaningless of the war on Troy, Odysseus is angry at the Gods for having stood by and let the carnage unfurl. All he wants to do is go home. But his journey will be an odyssey...

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Hvar (Stari Grad)
programme.desc: The island of Hvar, Croatia’s sunniest spot, is perfect for enjoying a traditional Dalmatian marenda. In the charming town of Stari Grad, restaurateur Damir Čavić welcomed us with a spread of marinated anchovies, octopus salad, pašticada, cod, and vegetables—washed down with a light bevanda.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Florence
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Florence, the heart of Tuscany and birthplace of the Renaissance. She visits iconic landmarks like the Duomo, Uffizi Gallery, and Ponte Vecchio, uncovering the city’s artistic legacy. Along the way, she enjoys Tuscan classics like Bistecca alla Fiorentina and the delicious schiaccata panino.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: When Rome was little more than a village, Athens was already laying the foundations of Western civilization. And today, amid its rich heritage, Greece’s vibrant capital continues to thrive.
